sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87211" key="proekpone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προεκ-πονέω</orth>, <sense id="n87211.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">work out, finish before,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0260.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Semon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
